newDeviceLogin.title: New Device Login Warning
newDeviceLogin.description: We detected a new login to your account.
newDeviceLogin.warning: If this was not you, please log in to the original device and log out from this device.
newDeviceLogin.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out this device? This action will require logging in again on that device.
